description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light gray horizontal siding, and the structure features a small, protruding entryway with its own gabled roof. The front facade includes a simple door and two rectangular windows, while the other sides have evenly spaced windows, providing a balanced appearance. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, creating modest eaves all around. The overall design is practical and unadorned, typical of modern American residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story house with a dark hip roof, light gray siding, and a small gabled entryway with a front door and windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a gabled roof, a door, and two windows.
description_view_1: Side view with two windows and the protruding entryway visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with two evenly spaced windows and no entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows and the entryway visible on the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front entryway with a gabled overhang, single door, and no porch or decorative columns.
